---
title: "about_1"
author: "Edward"
date: "2026-03-04"
output: html_document
---

The **_GAM-MAP_** is an interactive platform designed to support dynamic analysis of uncomplicated malaria alongside climatic variability across the regions of Ghana. At its core, the app integrates the **Generalised Additive Model (GAM)**, enabling comprehensive insights into the temporal and climatic drivers of malaria case patterns across Ghana's regions. The platform provides users with tools for descriptive analysis, time series decomposition, seasonality assessment, and model-based evaluation of climate-malaria relationships.

Please feel free to address any inquiries related to the use of the app via [akredw001@myuct.ac.za](mailto:akredw001@myuct.ac.za) or [akuruguedward@gmail.com](mailto:akuruguedward@gmail.com).
.
